stonetop.summary: Disciplined ascetics of the Whitefangs, heirs to the Rime Lords' teachings.

system.concept: Disciplined ascetics of the Whitefangs, heirs to the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.oi5Mg2wPABRjvHri]{Rime Lords}' teachings.
system.description: The fortress-monasteries of the Whitefangs follow the half-remembered teachings of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.oi5Mg2wPABRjvHri]{Rime Lords}. Consider creating custom instincts and moves for each group of monks, based on the teachings and practices of their monastery and sect — Empty Sky (ignore the suffering of others), Unmoved Mountain (push and test themselves), White Crystal (impose order), and others.
